---
title: 'Sharing: A Kingdom Parable from Bob Hamp.'
date: '2014-07-27T21:25:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6876960838358813654'
blogger_filename: '/2014/07/sharing-kingdom-parable-from-bob-hamp.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<div><br /><img alt="A Kingdom Parable, from Bob Hamp" src="data:image/png;base64," title="A Kingdom Parable, from Bob Hamp" /><br /><h3>A Kingdom Parable</h3><div>from <a href="http://bobhamp.com/foundations-of-freedom/a-kingdom-parable/" target="_blank">Bob Ham.&nbsp; </a></div><div><br /></div>I'm not posting this week. But I think you should watch and/or read ANYTHING by Bob Hamp. Therefore, check out this video embedded below, and grow. Click <a href="http://bobhamp.com/foundations-of-freedom/a-kingdom-parable/" target="_blank">HERE </a>to check out his site!</div><br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" height="287" mozallowfullscreen="" src="//player.vimeo.com/video/30750987" webkitallowfullscreen="" width="500"></iframe> <br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;" target="_blank">About This Blog, and Darrell.&nbsp;</a><br /><br /><br /><h4>Do you see yourself in this story?&nbsp;</h4><h4>Do you see yourself in more than one character?&nbsp;</h4><h4>Are you raising an Acrobat?&nbsp;</h4><h4>Comment on this post. </h4></div>
